data.title: Project Director
data.location: Dubai International Financial Center, DU, AE
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Overview**

Turbo Testimonials Inc is a fast\-growing reputation management and customer feedback technology company, dedicated to helping businesses collect, manage, and showcase authentic client testimonials. With our headquarters in the Dubai International Financial Center, we serve clients across the UAE and globally. As we expand our project portfolio, we are looking for an experienced and strategic Project Director to lead high\-impact initiatives and drive operational excellence.

data.title: Principal Data Engineer
data.raw_snippet:
##### **Job Purpose**

At Emirates Group our Analytics Centre of Excellence (ACoE) is a centralized unit that provides data and analytics support to Emirates Group businesses. This allows our businesses to make better decisions by using data and analytics to understand our customers, operations, and markets. The ACoE is an essential part of Emirates Group's digital transformation strategy. The unit is helping Emirates Group to become a more data\-driven organization and to make better decisions

data.title: Head of Oil and Gas Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Title**

***Head of Oil and Gas Operations***

**Job Summary**

The Head of Oil and Gas Operations leads and oversees all operational activities across upstream, midstream, or downstream functions to ensure safe, efficient, compliant, and profitable performance. This role is responsible for operational strategy, production execution, resource planning, budget control, risk management, and cross\-functional coordination.
